title: Foo Bar Postgres Index Tuning
description: Add indexes to a Postgres table with 500k rows. Queries filtering by user_id and created_at are slow; create appropriate indexes to meet latency targets.

tasks.description: Create indexes on app.orders for user_id and created_at so the slow queries in /workspace/queries/ run under 50ms.

infrastructure.description: Postgres with app.orders (500k rows). No indexes on user_id or created_at; queries in /workspace/queries/ are slow.
